---
title: "<i>Reader: A review of current literature, science, and art, The</i>"
---

## <i>Reader: A review of current literature, science, and art, The</i>

**Type:** periodical

### About

Mentioned 11 August 1863. It ran January 1863 - July 1866.

### Letters Mentioning This Organization


---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
